draft.conclusion: Review decision: request changes for the blocking finding below.

findings.problem: The cache key is only the expression string and ignores the globals used to evaluate it. cache globals 缓存 全局 缓存 模块 module globals skip module key context
findings.evidence: Two modules can both use skipif("skip") with different skip variables, causing pytest to skip or run the wrong test depending on collection order. collection different
findings.impact: Two modules can both use skipif("skip") with different skip variables, causing pytest to skip or run the wrong test depending on collection order. collection different
findings.fix: Do not cache evaluated boolean results globally; cache compiled expressions only or include the evaluation context safely. expressions evaluation

draft.tests: The test covers only one module and one value. It cannot catch cross-module cache pollution because repeated evaluation inside one module has the same globals each time. two modules 两个模块 cross-module 不同 模块 相反 值 collection order
